message:
feat(trace): track cumulative event count to detect ring buffer eviction

Add total_pushed atomic counter to TraceBufferInner that increments on
every push regardless of ring buffer eviction. This enables runtime to
detect when the trace is incomplete (total_pushed > snapshot.len()),
which is critical for the refinement firewall: incomplete traces must
skip firewall checks to prevent false negatives from missing events.

Changes:
- Add total_pushed AtomicU64 counter to TraceBufferInner, incremented
  on every push() call
- Add total_pushed() public accessor method
- Export refinement_firewall module from trace/mod.rs
- Add unit tests verifying empty state returns 0, single push returns 1,
  and counter continues incrementing through ring buffer eviction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
